metadata.name: Manage Costume Rentals for a Period Drama

description: A TV production needs to rent several period-specific costumes from an external costume house.

nodes.task_description: Identify the required costumes and the rental dates based on the shooting schedule.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a list of all needed costumes and the duration of the rental.

nodes.task_description: Contact the costume house to check availability and get a rental quote.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent receives a quote and confirmation of availability.

nodes.task_description: Process the rental agreement and schedule the pickup of the costumes.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finalizes the rental and arranges for logistics.
